---
title: "Practice123"
format: docx
editor: visual
---

## CHAPTER 6

MODE

```{r}
table <- as.data.frame(cbind(LETTERS[1:6], c(1,2,2,3,1,3)))
names(table) <- c("Letters", "Frequency")
table
```

MEDIAN

```{r}
#FOR ODD
samp.even <- c(83, 12, 3, 1, 99, 101)
samp.even <- sort(samp.even)
samp.even
medn1 <- (samp.even[length(samp.even)/2] + samp.even[length(samp.even)/2 + 1])/2
medn1
median(samp.even)
#FOR EVEN
```
